title: inga umbratica
intro: Inga umbratica, a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, is also known as the "umbrella tree" due to its unique umbrella-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Inga umbratica include treating fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the Inga umbratica plant are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
